Author: rebelmike
Content:
Hi @Tholin, I’m looking to use your cell library in the next run. I was doing an initial port last night and saw there aren’t latch or clock gate cells. This isn’t a show stopper, but especially a latch would be good to have.
Do you have any plans to add them?

Author: tholin
Content: There are latch cells in the library, but you have to manually instantiate them as they lack characterization data.

Author: tholin
Content: You have to exclude all paths through the latches in STA

Author: tholin
Content: You’re on your own for making the timing work
